name: @aily-project/lib-dfrobot-c4002
nickname_ja: DFRobot C4002 ミリ波レーダー
author: vonweller
description: C4002 是基于 24GHz FMCW 技术的毫米波雷达模块，可在智能家居场景中检测运动、静止和微动人体，支持速度、方向、环境光、分区检测与探测范围调节。
description_zh_cn: C4002 是基于 24GHz FMCW 技术的毫米波雷达模块，可在智能家居场景中检测运动、静止和微动人体，支持速度、方向、环境光、分区检测与探测范围调节。
description_en: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot C4002 24GHz mmWave radar sensor, including UART initialization, detection results, light value, OUT pin mode, range, gate, sensitivity, calibration, and factory reset blocks.
description_zh_hk: 適用於 DFRobot C4002 24GHz 毫米波雷達感測器的 Aily Blockly 庫，包含串口初始化、偵測結果、光照值、OUT 輸出模式、量程、距離門、靈敏度、校準和恢復出廠設定積木。
description_ja: DFRobot C4002 24GHz mmWave レーダーセンサー用の Aily Blockly ライブラリです。UART 初期化、検出結果、照度、OUT ピン、範囲、ゲート、感度、校正、工場出荷リセットを扱えます。
description_ko: DFRobot C4002 24GHz mmWave 레이더 센서용 Aily Blockly 라이브러리입니다. UART 초기화, 감지 결과, 조도, OUT 핀 모드, 범위, 게이트, 감도, 보정, 공장 초기화를 지원합니다.
description_de: Aily Blockly-Bibliothek fuer den DFRobot C4002 24GHz-mmWave-Radarsensor mit UART-Initialisierung, Messwerten, Lichtwert, OUT-Pin-Modus, Bereich, Gates, Empfindlichkeit, Kalibrierung und Werksreset.
description_fr: Bibliotheque Aily Blockly pour le radar mmWave DFRobot C4002 24 GHz avec initialisation UART, resultats, lumiere, mode OUT, portee, portes, sensibilite, calibration et reinitialisation usine.
description_es: Biblioteca Aily Blockly para el radar mmWave DFRobot C4002 de 24 GHz con inicializacion UART, resultados, luz, modo OUT, rango, puertas, sensibilidad, calibracion y reinicio de fabrica.
description_pt: Biblioteca Aily Blockly para o radar mmWave DFRobot C4002 de 24 GHz com inicializacao UART, resultados, luz, modo OUT, alcance, gates, sensibilidade, calibracao e reset de fabrica.
description_ru: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot C4002 24GHz mmWave radar sensor with UART initialization, detection results, light value, OUT pin mode, range, gates, sensitivity, calibration, and factory reset.
description_ar: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot C4002 24GHz mmWave radar sensor with UART initialization, detection results, light value, OUT pin mode, range, gates, sensitivity, calibration, and factory reset.
